---
title: "Projects - Example Project for ECON 325"
date: 12 January 2023
description: "Let's put it all together! This notebook is an example of what a \"final project\" might look like in ECON 325. It summarizes and uses all of the empirical skills and R commands present in the other notebooks."
categories: [econ 325, regression, hypothesis testing, projects, t-test, visualization, summary statistics, R]
---

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=Projects_Example_Project_ECON325.html">

If you are not redirected automatically, [click here](Projects_Example_Project_ECON325.html).
